claims.text: Compliance Review Memo: The provided records include an Amendment No. 1 to Form F-X for sec_vprr_02000258.pdf, a Form F-X-related scanned filing for sec_vprr_02000259.pdf, and a Form D for sec_vprr_07040010.pdf.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Amendment No. 1 to Form F-X identifies Kabushiki Kaisha Asahi Ginko as the filer/issuer.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The U.S. agent for service of process in the Amendment No. 1 to Form F-X is identified as Eiji Ohashi, General Manager of The Asahi Bank, Ltd. New York Branch.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The signatory for the Form F-X filer is identified as Mr. Hideki Fukushima, Chief Deputy General Manager.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D identifies Stella Station Trust as the name of the offering and the issuer.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D lists the issuer’s executive office address as 11690 Grooms Road, Cincinnati, OH 45242, with telephone number 513 554 1110.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D describes Stella Station Trust’s business as purchasing, holding, leasing, managing, selling, exchanging, redeveloping, subdividing, and improving real property and interests in real property.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D indicates the filing was made under Rule 506 and marked as a new filing.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D states the issuer did not intend to sell to non-accredited investors in the offering.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D lists the minimum investment accepted from any individual as $0.00.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D indicates joint ownership of a single unit was not permitted.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D lists no person paid or given commission or similar remuneration for solicitation of purchasers in connection with securities sales in the offering.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D reports accredited-investor purchases of $10,400.00 and non-accredited-investor purchases of $0.00.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D reports $0.00 for listed issuance and distribution expenses, including transfer agent fees, printing and engraving, legal fees, accounting fees, engineering fees, sales commissions, other expenses, and total expenses.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form F-X-related records include a related Form CB filing, file number 5-51260, barcode/reference 02000258, and SEC received/processed date of January 29, 2002.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The related Form CB filing date is recorded as January 10, 2002, and the Form F-X document is recorded as signed on January 24, 2002.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D page carries barcode/serial number 07040010 and a handwritten/printed number at top of 1386733.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form F-X text states that civil suits, actions, or administrative proceedings may be commenced by service of process upon the agent for service of process, and that administrative subpoenas may be served on that agent.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form F-X text states that service upon the agent is to be treated as valid and binding as if personal service had been made.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form F-X text includes an undertaking to appoint a successor agent and file an amended Form F-X if the filer discharges the agent or the agent is unwilling or unable to accept service.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: For certain Form F-X filing contexts, the undertaking to appoint a successor agent and file an amended Form F-X runs until six years have elapsed from specified triggering dates; confirm before treating as a deadline.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form F-X text includes an undertaking to advise the Commission promptly of any change to the agent’s name and address.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D instructions state that five copies of the notice must be filed with the SEC, one manually signed, and unsigned copies must be photocopies of the manually signed copy or bear typed or printed signatures.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D instructions state that there is no federal filing fee.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.

claims.text: The Form D instructions list the filing address as the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission, 450 Fifth Street, N.W., Washington, D.C. 20549.
claims.reason: All citation quotes are grounded in cited evidence.
